name: Ranger Gold Corp.
summary: PART I General History Ranger Gold Corp. (we, us, or the Company) was incorporated on May 11, 2007 under the laws of the State of Nevada under the name Fenario, Inc. The Company was formed to develop and license proprietary software solutions for healthcare providers, health care professionals and health insurance companies.
